Anarchy.desc: On Auto-Reload or kill, grants Damage and Accuracy for a Maximum of stacks, which reset on manual Reload

Asher's Rise.desc: Critical Hits apply Status Effects instead of increased impact Damage
Asher's Rise.redText: How can we possibly have the slightest idea what to expect?

Bod.desc: Counts as a Shotgun, an Assault Rifle, a Sniper Rifle, a Pistol, and an SMG
Bod.redText: Do you believe in this thing, or not?

Bonnie and Clyde.desc: On kill, grants Damage for the Gun's other Mode and refills its Magazine
Bonnie and Clyde.redText: From a schoolboy to a rattlesnake.

Boomslang.desc: After Reloading, the first Critical Hit Ricochets a Sticky Projectile to nearby enemies

Broken Wings.redText: It's a sprint, not a marathon.

Budget Deity.desc: Shoots Corrosive, Cryo, and Incendiary droplets (element combo varies)

Bugbear.desc: Scales up to max Damage and Damage Radius based on the emptiness of the Magazine

Bully.desc: When Gun Shields are activated, launches an Attack Drone periodically

Birt's Bees.redText: Fill your life with laughter and bees.

Bloody Lumberjack.redText: You're more lost than you realize.

Complex Root.desc: Spawns additional diverging Projectiles along its path
Complex Root.redText: It's the nucleus of every man-made invention of today.

Conflux.desc: Deals bonus Damage per Status Effect on the target

Convergence.redText: Steel chambers, late the pyres; Of her salamandrine fires

Crazed Earl.desc: Fires Shards that stick into enemies. Meleeing enemies with Shards will explode the Shards and send them toward other nearby enemies.

Darkbeast.desc: Bullets pierce enemies, and have a chance when hitting an enemy to cause an explosion

Divided Focus.desc: Fires bouncing Projectiles that pierce enemies
Divided Focus.redText: That's whatever you were talking about for ya.

Eigenburst.desc: Damage increases as loaded ammo decreases

Fearstalker.desc: Critical Hits grant a Stack of Deduction that increases the next Non-Critical Hit Damage per Stack. Non-Critical Hits grant a Stack of Observation that increases the next Critical Hit Damage per Stack.
Fearstalker.redText: Quite right...mauled to death it seems.

Finnity XXX-L.desc: Does not consume Ammo while Overheating
Finnity XXX-L.redText: As seen on Monday Night Rehabilitation.

First Impression.desc: Chance to Critically Hit based on the target's health percentage.

Fisheye.desc: Fires wide, penetrating triple Railgun shots with bonus Critical Damage
Fisheye.redText: See, I told you they'd listen to Reason.

Flash Cyclone.desc: Chance on Hit to Explode and Spawn additional projectiles
Flash Cyclone.redText: What cyclone? Its a couple of flakes!

Fleabag.desc: Sticky Projectiles move to the most recently hit target

G.M.R..desc: When Zoomed In, Damage increases, Shot Cost increases, and Fire Rate decreases

Goalkeeper.desc: When Gun Shield is depleted, grants bonus Damage for a duration
Goalkeeper.redText: I'm not camping! I'm guarding the flag.

Golden God.desc: When Overheating, the Bulletforge does not break, but instead continually consumes greater amounts of Ammo

Goremaster.desc: Deals bonus Damage to enemies below a Health threshold

Hair Trigger.desc: Projectiles explode when releasing the trigger
Hair Trigger.redText: You're going to regret this the rest of your life...

Handcannon.desc: Sticky Projectiles deal Damage while attached to targets
Handcannon.redText: Dangerous toys are fun, but you could get hurt.

Hellwalker.redText: A piece of the moon hung in the sky like a polished bone.

Hemorrhage.desc: Deals increased Damage the farther away the target is

Hot Slugger.desc: On kill, deal bonus Damage for a duration, Maximum 3 Stacks
Hot Slugger.redText: The madder I am, the thicker my accent gets!

Inkling.desc: Fires bouncing Projectiles that leave an Elemental Splat on bounce
Inkling.redText: Gonna paint your wagon, gonna paint it fine.

Inscriber.desc: Hitting enemies spawns 4 projectiles behind them

Kaleidosplode.redText: Trying to paint the prettiest picture I can with the colors I have.

Katagawa's Revenge.redText: You might hurt someone, and that's MY @#%in' job.

King's Gambit.desc: When shot, thrown Gun Ricochets Projectiles to nearby enemies
King's Gambit.redText: The refutation of any gambit begins with accepting it.

Laser Disker.desc: Deals bonus Damage to airborne enemies
Laser Disker.redText: A U.F.O. is just an I.F.O. you haven't met.

Lead Balloon.desc: Projectiles float upward and spawn child Projectiles upon exploding
Lead Balloon.redText: For a brick, he flew pretty good.

Linebacker.desc: Bouncing Projectiles increase Damage and Damage Radius per bounce

Lucian's Flank.desc: Critical Hits refill Ammo to the Gun's Magazine

Lucky Clover.desc: On Reload, fires 2 Homing Rockets that deal Damage each
Lucky Clover.redText: Such devastation... This was my intention.

Luty Madlad.desc: Overheats quickly, but also Cools down quickly

Matador's Match.redText: You've been officially labeled a 'Disturber of the Peace.'

Mercredi.desc: Cycles between different firing styles on Reload. While Target-locked, gain a stacking buff that grants bonus Damage per stack.
Mercredi.redText: Lord Tuesday wishes to speak of burgers.

Mercurious.desc: Bullet Damage scales with Movement Speed
Mercurious.redText: The mighty giant-killer, stood there, spellbound.

Midnight Defiance.desc: On hit, additional Projectiles spawn from nearby enemies

Missilaser.desc: Underbarrel fires Sticky Rockets that are detonated by the Gun's laser

Murmur.desc: Deals Critical Damage to enemies under 35% health.

Noisy Cricket.redText: Feel like I'm gonna break this damn thing!

Ohm I Got.desc: When Energy Shield is active, grants Damage by consuming the Shield's energy instead of Ammo. When Overshield is also active, Energy Shield will not deplete.
Ohm I Got.redText: Back off, man. I'm a scientist.

Onslaught.desc: Chance for every bullet fired to deal extra Damage and not consume Ammo

Oscar Mike.desc: The first half of your Magazine deals +50% Bonus Damage
Oscar Mike.redText: Duty called, I answered, we hung out. Duty's awesome!

Phantom Flame.desc: Zooming In acquires Lock On targets over time, and firing while Zoomed In shoots the entire Magazine

Prince Harming.desc: Hitting enemies deals Damage to you, and grants a Stack of Cruelty - which, on kill, restores Overshield per Stack of Cruelty

Prowler.desc: Bullets slowly home in on targets. Reloading accelerates them toward their targets.

Queen's Rest.desc: Fires high-speed rounds, and damaging enemies has a chance to spawn a Homing Sticky Projectile
Queen's Rest.redText: I could set this world on fire and call it rain.

Ravenfire.desc: Explosions radiate outward from the point of impact

Reminisce.desc: Does not reload, and instead refills Ammo when the projectiles return

Roach.desc: Shoots eggs that hatch flying roaches when attached to flesh, living or dead

Roil.desc: Overheating prevents firing, and switching modes will reduce heat

Rooker.desc: [Alt-Fire] Fires 2 Needles that continuously home in on enemies that are being aimed at.

Roulette.redText: Papa needs a new pair of class mods!

Rowan's Charge.desc: Grants a chance for shots to be a Critical Hit, and refunds Ammo on Critical Hit

Ruby's Grasp.desc: Reloading the Gun fires Homing copies

San Saba Songbird.desc: Deals bonus Damage after swapping Guns
San Saba Songbird.redText: Let me tell you, buddy - there's a faster gun...

Scoot'n'Shoot.desc: Phantom Guns fire from the locations of your previous shots. Phantom Guns reset on reload.

Shalashaska.desc: On Auto-Reload, grants a Stack of Exhiliration. Each Stack increases the number of possible Ricochets by 1. Resets on manual Reload.
Shalashaska.redText: I love to reload during a battle.

Sideshow.desc: Shoot as many targets as possible before they hit the ground, and refill up to 2 Ammo per target hit

Soul Survivor.desc: Deals increased Damage for each ally in Fight For Your Life

Star Helix.desc: Projectiles can be fired vertically or horizontally
Star Helix.redText: They see the stars, and they think, "Mine."

Stop Gap.desc: When firing, Fire Rate decreases, but Damage increases

Stray.desc: Fires 2 secondary bullets that home in on nearby target(s)

Sunspot.desc: Damage scales based on the emptiness of the Magazine
Sunspot.redText: Sun Spot! Sun Spot run! Run Spot run!

Sweet Embrace.redText: Absence makes the heart grow fonder.

Symmetry.desc: Fires from reserve Ammo while charging
Symmetry.redText: We all lined up to see the syzygy, but only the guy in front saw anything.

Tankbuster.desc: Heals nearby enemies to deal additional Damage per enemy healed
Tankbuster.redText: What you feel makes part of what they'll feel

Truck.redText: To truly be old-school: build it yourself.

Unstable Kor.desc: Detonating Stickies triggers a Nova. Nova Damage scales with the number of attached Stickies.
Unstable Kor.redText: It's building up, building up, building deep inside.

Vamoose.redText: Faster than a knife fight in a phone booth.

Whiskey Foxtrot.desc: Overdrive: Switches to a secondary Magazine that can be fired on Full Auto. Scrap Cannon: Fires a spread of shrapnel from the Underbarrel and increases target's Damage Taken for 8s

Wombo Combo.desc: Rockets automatically fire from the Underbarrel
Wombo Combo.redText: Where you at? Where you at? Where you at?

Zipper.desc: Grants Critical Damage and bonus Damage when hitting a target in the back

ARC-TAN.redText: Not to go off on a tangent...

Anchor.redText: Across the big lough we were going, But sadly a great gale was blowing. We stopped on the shore, Built a fire and did more, But that was the end of the rowing.

Crow-Sourced.redText: And we had to share the rock!

Cindershelly.desc: When damaged, grants a Stack of Resolve that reduces Damage Taken per Stack. When the Energy Shield breaks, releases a Nova that deals Damage, with each Stack of Resolve increasing the Damage.

Compleation.desc: When Armor Shield is full, it instantly loses an Armor Segment

Elpis Star.desc: When dealing Melee Damage, spawn a Meteor Cluster to fall on the damaged enemy.

Extra Medium.desc: When Energy Shield breaks or fills, it triggers a Nova that deals Damage
Extra Medium.redText: Never above five on the call sheet of life.

Firebreak.desc: When Energy Shield breaks, triggers a Nova on 3 enemies that deals Damage

Firewerks.desc: On kill, spawns Missiles that home in on nearby enemies and deal Damage each

Guardian Angel.desc: When equipped, grants faster revival from Fight for Your Life. When FFYL expires, grants 1 free Second Wind periodically

Heavyweight.desc: On Melee Hit, consumes an Armor Segment to grant Melee Damage. When Armor Shield is empty, grants Melee Damage

Hoarder.desc: On kill, chance to spawn an Ammo Booster that instantly refills your Gun

Honey Badger.desc: Reduces self-Damage Dealt while Shield is active
Honey Badger.redText: You're saying it in your head, so I don't have to type it.

Hopscotch.desc: Spawns a Singularity when an Armor Segment breaks
Hopscotch.redText: I kept you hopping didn't I?

Onion.desc: On Armor Segment break, grants Immunity to Damage for a duration
Onion.redText: You don't have to cry about it.

Pandoran Memento.desc: When damaged, grants Elemental Resistance and Resistance to the last Damage Type received

Principal.desc: Spawns a Shield Boi when the last Armor Segment breaks

Protean Cell.desc: Ground Slam to toggle this effect. While enabled, drains Shield over time to grant Bonus Shock Damage, and Damage Taken passes through the Shield

Super Soldier.desc: When Energy Shield fills, grants an Overshield. When Energy Shield is full, grants Fire Rate, Movement Speed, and regens Ammo/s
Super Soldier.redText: I'll never forget the adventures we had.

Timekeeper's New Shield.desc: When equipped, grants Maximum Health, Health Regeneration/s, and reduces Damage Taken

Undershield.desc: On Armor Segment break, grants Overshield
Undershield.redText: Anything worth doing is worth doing in excess.

Watts 4 Dinner.desc: When Energy Shield is active, enemies have a chance to drop an Overshield when hit. When Overshield is also active, grants Shock Damage
Watts 4 Dinner.redText: Watt was yours is now mine.

Short Circuit.desc: While Energy Shield is not full, it periodically Shocks nearby enemies

Budget Deity (Grenade).desc: Throws 2 Combo Orbs, which place the Atlas Target Lock on enemies damaged by the Combo Orbs

Chaumurky.desc: Continuously homes in on a target

Countermeasure.desc: Launches flares that distract nearby enemies
Countermeasure.redText: Separate the wheat from the chaff.

Destructo Disco.redText: I don't even think the worms are awake yet...

Faulty Detonator.desc: Grenade spawns Combo Orbs upon detonation

Firepot.desc: Spawns homing Torgue Stickies over time

Recursive.redText: Let's do this, one last time...

Sho Kunai.desc: Grants Movement Speed for a short Duration with each consecutive hit

Spinning Blade.desc: Catch the rebound to refund 1 Grenade Charge

Waterfall.desc: Causes additional explosions when damaging targets
Waterfall.redText: I'm only going to ask this once. Who. Is. JASON?!

Blood Rush.desc: Automatically restores Health on Second Wind

Blood Siphon.desc: On kill, converts excess Damage into Healing Orbs that seek out nearby allies

Broken Vial.desc: Heals for the last instances of Damage taken within the last few seconds

Cardiac Shock.desc: When Health goes below a threshold, there is a chance to replenish a Repkit Charge

Chrome.desc: On use, grants Fire Rate and Movement Speed, and reduces Repkit Cooldown each time Damage is taken

Healthraiser.desc: Spawns Health Boosters at the start and end of the Repkit's duration.

Heart Pump.desc: This Repkit has 3 Charges, and has a chance to replenish a Charge on kill

Immunity Shot.desc: On use, grants Immunity to the last Elemental Damage Taken for a duration

Pulsometer.desc: Passively regenerates Health over time, increasing in Rate when your Health is low

Roid Rage (Corrosive).desc: On Use applies stacks of Roid-Rage that decay over time. Each time a stack expires spawn a Corrosive Nova.

Roid Rage (Cryo).desc: On Use applies stacks of Roid-Rage that decay over time. Each time a stack expires spawn a Cryo Nova.

Roid Rage (Fire).desc: On Use applies stacks of Roid-Rage that decay over time. Each time a stack expires spawn a Fire Nova.

Roid Rage (Radiation).desc: On Use applies stacks of Roid-Rage that decay over time. Each time a stack expires spawn a Radiation Nova.

Roid Rage (Shock).desc: On Use applies stacks of Roid-Rage that decay over time. Each time a stack expires spawn a Shock Nova.

Time Dilation.desc: The Repkit's Duration is increased, and its Cooldown Duration is decreased

Disc Jockey.desc: Energy disc Projectiles bounce up to max times, and gain Damage per bounce

Gamma Void.desc: Creates a Singularity in which enemies take Radiation Damage over time

Heimdahl.desc: Fires Dahl soldier heads that attack nearby enemies

Streamer.desc: Launches stationary Projectiles that each fire a Beam forward

Bullet Amp.desc: Shooting through the barrier amplifies gun damage

Ironskin.desc: Take reduced damage while in the terminal, damage reduction decreases over time

On the Go.desc: Activating the terminal will teleport it to the player's current position
On the Go.redText: For the healer... on the gooooooo!

Atlas Dart Underbarrel.desc: Fires Tracker Darts, tagging enemies that your Projectiles will home in on

Atlas Grenade Underbarrel.desc: Fires Tracker Grenades, tagging enemies that your Projectiles will home in on
